title: Smart Matching Between Talent and Employers
description: Specially designed for telemarketing professions, Call Center Match revolutionizes call center recruitment by combining advanced technology and human expertise.

values.title: Real-time notifications
values.desc: Alerts as soon as a profile matches

storyQuote: Long before the launch of CallCenterMatch.ai in 2025, we were already alongside call centers. Since 2022, we have supported over 15 centers in their recruitment. This 3-year experience allowed us to deeply understand real field needs.
ctaSubtitle: Whether you're a recruiter or a candidate, we have a place for you.
